responses.thoughts:
**Final Subtitle Transcription**

Alright, let's get down to brass tacks here. I need to generate accurate subtitles for this video clip, so I've meticulously gone through it, analyzing the audio and burnt-in text frame by frame. Here's the breakdown, in chronological order:

First, we have the "Welcome to Japari Park" sequence, which starts with a nice little intro:

*   **"ララララ ララララ" / "La la la la, la la la la"** (00:00.000 - 00:02.800)
*   **"素敵な旅立ち" / "A wonderful departure"** (00:02.800 - 00:05.500)
*   **"ようこそ" / "Welcome to"** (00:05.500 - 00:07.100)
*   **"ジャパリパークへ！" / "Japari Park!"** (00:07.100 - 00:09.500)

After that, there's a long instrumental transition with car sounds. No subtitles here. Just silence.

Now, we hit the "Night of Fire" section. This one requires a bit more care:

The introduction has some vocalizing:

*   **"Fire, fire"** (00:43.800 - 00:46.000)
*   **"Oh oh oh oh..."** (00:46.000 - 00:49.000)
*   **"Fire, fire, fire"** (00:49.000 - 00:52.000)
*   **"Oh oh oh oh..."** (00:52.000 - 00:55.000)
*   **"Oh oh oh oh..."** (00:55.000 - 01:01.000)
*   **"Oh oh oh oh..."** (01:01.000 - 01:07.000)
*   **"Night of fire!"** (01:07.200 - 01:08.800)
*   **"Night of fire!"** (01:13.500 - 01:15.200)
*   **"Fire!"** (01:20.000 - 01:21.000)

Then the main verses begin:

*   **"Welcome to my broken low"** (01:33.200 - 01:36.400)
*   **"Welcome to the famous disco live"** (01:36.400 - 01:39.500)
*   **"Come on lady come and go"** (01:39.500 - 01:42.500)
*   **"Come on lady get me once tonight"** (01:42.500 - 01:45.000)
*   **"Not a danger, not a blacky stranger"** (01:45.300 - 01:48.300)
*   **"Rock it, rock it, knock to my door I'll open"** (01:48.300 - 01:51.000)
*   **"Speak my name now, speak it if you know how"** (01:51.000 - 01:54.200)
*   **"Fly to me, get ready for the"** (01:54.200 - 01:57.500)

Now, the chorus, carefully capturing the burnt-in text and vocal timing:

*   **"Night of fire,"** (01:57.500 - 01:59.000)
*   **"you've better better stay"** (01:59.000 - 02:01.000)
